_source: AI-analyzed by Claude (Anthropic) — estimated monthly costs in USD for a single digital nomad. Calibrated against Numbeo, NomadList, Expatistan, and World Bank GDP/PPP data as of 2025.
_methodology: Each value is a monthly estimate in USD. rentCenter = 1BR city center, rentOutside = 1BR outside center, groceries = monthly groceries for 1 person, dining = ~12 casual restaurant meals/month, transport = public transit pass, utilities = electricity+water+heating+internet, coworking = hot desk monthly pass, healthInsurance = basic private/travel insurance. totalBasic = rentOutside+groceries+transport+utilities. totalComfortable = rentCenter+groceries+dining+transport+utilities+coworking+healthInsurance. null = data unavailable.
